ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction where the mortality data was collected */,
  "mmwr_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MMWR year */,
  "mmwr_week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MMWR week */,
  "week_ending_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week ending date */,
  "all_cause" INTEGER /* Number of all-cause deaths */,
  "natural_cause" INTEGER /* Number of natural-cause deaths */,
  "septicemia" INTEGER /* Number of septicemia deaths */,
  "malignant_neoplasms" INTEGER /* Number of malignant neoplasms deaths */,
  "diabetes_mellitus" INTEGER /* Number of diabetes mellitus deaths */,
  "alzheimer_disease" INTEGER /* Number of Alzheimer disease deaths */,
  "influenza_pneumonia" INTEGER /* Number of influenza and pneumonia deaths */,
  "chronic_lower_respiratory_diseases" INTEGER /* Number of chronic lower respiratory diseases deaths */,
  "other_diseases_respiratory_system" INTEGER /* Number of other diseases of the respiratory system deaths */,
  "nephritis_nephrotic_syndrome_nephrosis" INTEGER /* Number of nephritis, nephrotic syndrome, and nephrosis deaths */,
  "symptoms_signs_abnormal_clinical_laboratory_findings" INTEGER /* Number of symptoms, signs, and abnormal clinical and laboratory findings deaths */,
  "diseases_of_heart" INTEGER /* Number of diseases of the heart deaths */,
  "cerebrovascular_diseases" INTEGER /* Number of cerebrovascular diseases deaths */,
  "covid_19_mc" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths (multiple cause of death) */,
  "covid_19_uc" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths (underlying cause of death) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for data creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_mmwr_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("mmwr_week_id") REFERENCES mmwr_weeks ("mmwr_week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_mmwr_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("mmwr_year_id") REFERENCES mmwr_years ("mmwr_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_week_ending_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_ending_date_id") REFERENCES week_ending_dates ("week_ending_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the jurisdiction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause of death */,
  "parent_cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mmwr_years" (
  "mmwr_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MMWR year */,
  "mmwr_year" INTEGER /* MMWR year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the MMWR year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the MMWR year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mmwr_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mmwr_weeks" (
  "mmwr_week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MMWR week */,
  "mmwr_week" INTEGER /* MMWR week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the MMWR week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the MMWR week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mmwr_week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "week_ending_dates" (
  "week_ending_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week ending date */,
  "week_ending_date" TEXT /* Date the week ended */,
  "mmwr_week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MMWR week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_ending_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_week_ending_dates_mmwr_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("mmwr_week_id") REFERENCES mmwr_weeks ("mmwr_week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, public health official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mortality data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mortality data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Data viewed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mortality_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("mortality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_flags" (
  "mortality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality flag */,
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality data */,
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_flags_mortality_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_flags_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("flag_id") REFERENCES flags ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_19_data" (
  "covid_19_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 record */,
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality data */,
  "mcod" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths (multiple cause of death) */,
  "ucod" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths (underlying cause of death) */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 cases */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 hospitalizations */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_19_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_19_data_mortality_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("mortality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdiction_geographic_regions" (
  "jurisdiction_geographic_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction geographic region */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_geographic_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jurisdiction_geographic_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jurisdiction_geographic_regions_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_versions_mortality_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("mortality_id")
)
